an3.12:1.1: “Monks, these three things are to be remembered by a head-anointed noble-warrior king throughout life.
an3.12:1.4: This is the first thing that is to be remembered by a head-anointed noble-warrior king throughout life.
an3.12:2.1: “Then again, the place where he was head-anointed as a noble-warrior king:
an3.12:2.2: This is the second thing that is to be remembered by a head-anointed noble-warrior king throughout life.
an3.12:3.1: “Then again, the place where, having won the battle, he then emerged victorious and ruled at the head of the battle:
an3.12:3.2: This is the third thing that is to be remembered by a head-anointed noble-warrior king throughout life.
an3.12:3.3: “These, monks, are the three things to be remembered by a head-anointed noble-warrior king throughout life.
an3.12:4.1: “In the same way, these three things are to be remembered by a monk throughout life.
an3.12:4.3: “The place where, shaving off his hair & beard, clothing himself in the ochre robe, he goes forth from the home life into homelessness:
an3.12:4.4: This is the first thing that is to be remembered by a monk throughout life.
an3.12:5.1: “Then again, the place where he discerns, as it has come to be, ‘This is stress’ … ‘This is the origination of stress’ … ‘This is the cessation of stress’ … ‘This is the path of practice leading to the cessation of stress’:
an3.12:5.2: This is the second thing that is to be remembered by a monk throughout life.
an3.12:6.1: “Then again, the place where, through the ending of effluents, he enters & remains in the effluent-free awareness-release & discernment-release, directly knowing & realizing it for himself right in the here-&-now:
an3.12:6.2: This is the third thing that is to be remembered by a monk throughout life.
an3.12:6.3: “These, monks, are the three things to be remembered by a monk throughout life.”
